instructions:
Deploy the main Next.js app to Vercel production.

Current state:
- Vercel CLI (npx vercel) IS available — v54.7.1
- Human gatekeeper IS logged into Vercel
- .env.example created with all required vars documented
- .env.local created (blank) — human needs to fill in real Supabase credentials
- project has vercel:deploy script in package.json

Steps:
1. Ask human gatekeeper to fill NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in .env.local
   - Tell them where to find these: Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → API
2. Ask human gatekeeper if they have an existing Vercel project to link, or should we create a new one
3. Create vercel.json in project root (standard Next.js config)
4. Run npx vercel link (or vercel deploy with --prod)
5. Set Supabase env vars in Vercel Dashboard → Project Settings → Environment Variables
6. Run npm run build to verify
7. Run npx vercel --prod to deploy
8. Verify QA dashboard loads at deployed URL
9. Write deployment URL and results to current_work_order.json result_log

Deferred for later (Phase 2):
- Secrets manager (Doppler/Vault)
- Custom domain
- CDN configuration
context: Files created during this session: lib/storage.ts, app/api/token-usage/route.ts, app/api/qa/results/route.ts, app/api/qa/push-results/route.ts, .env.example, .env.local, docs/secrets-management-comparison.md. QA dashboard page.tsx was updated to fetch from API instead of static imports. Token Usage section added to dashboard.
